hotel.name: Amora Tapae Phitsanulok (formerly Amarin Lagoon)
hotel.description: A resort-style hotel set in landscaped grounds with a large swimming pool, 3 km north of the city center. The property has spacious rooms with modern furnishings, a restaurant, fitness center, and pool area that make it feel more like a resort than a city hotel. Suited to travelers with their own transport who want space and a pool rather than being in the middle of the city action. Shuttle services to town available.
highlights: Large landscaped pool in resort-style grounds
Spacious rooms with modern furnishings away from city noise
Good value for the facilities offered

similarHotels.name: The Grand Riverside Hotel
similarHotels.description: A well-established mid-range hotel with a prime position directly in front of the Nan River. Comfortable rooms in a high-rise building with river or city views, reliable air conditioning, free Wi-Fi, and a restaurant serving Thai and Chinese cuisine on site. Walking distance to the Night Bazaar, Wat Yai, and the city's main attractions. Consistently solid reviews for cleanliness, helpful staff, and the unbeatable riverside setting.
highlights: Nan River frontage with rooms offering river views
Walking distance to Wat Yai, Night Bazaar, and riverside restaurants
On-site restaurant and reliable mid-range facilities

similarHotels.name: Topland Hotel & Convention Centre
similarHotels.description: Phitsanulok's largest hotel and the city's main business and events venue, with 4-star facilities in the heart of downtown. Spacious rooms with modern furnishings, multiple restaurants, a swimming pool, fitness center, and convention facilities. The central location puts guests within walking distance of the city's main commercial area and 5-10 minutes from Wat Yai and the riverside. Popular with both business travelers and families seeking reliable facilities.
highlights: Swimming pool and fitness center — uncommon at this price in Phitsanulok
Central downtown location with all amenities on site
Multiple dining options including Thai, Chinese, and international cuisine

similarHotels.name: Yodia Heritage Hotel
similarHotels.description: The most characterful hotel in Phitsanulok — a heritage property on the banks of the Nan River in the city center, within walking distance of Wat Yai and the Night Bazaar. Stylish rooms with wooden floors, private balconies, satellite TV, and coffee/tea facilities. The outdoor swimming pool and spa bath overlook the river. River-view rooms offer one of Phitsanulok's most atmospheric hotel experiences. Consistently rated as the best full-service hotel in the city.
highlights: Nan River frontage with outdoor pool and spa bath
Stylish heritage-style rooms with wooden floors and private balconies
Walking distance to Wat Yai, Chan Palace, and Night Bazaar

aiContent.hookIntro: Booking Amora Tapae Phitsanulok (formerly Amarin Lagoon) without knowing its 3km distance from the city center can leave you stranded without easy access to restaurants and sights.
aiContent.intro: Amora Tapae Phitsanulok (formerly Amarin Lagoon) offers a resort-like escape with spacious rooms, a large pool, and landscaped grounds just outside the urban bustle. It's ideal for families and leisure travelers who have their own transport or use the available shuttle, prioritizing relaxation over city convenience.
whyBook: Large pool in landscaped grounds for resort feel
Spacious rooms with modern furnishings away from noise
Fitness center and restaurant on-site for convenience
Shuttle service to city center included
Good value at mid-range pricing for facilities
whyNotBook: 3km from city center requires transport for most activities
Suburban location feels isolated without a car
Shuttle service may have wait times during peak hours
Rooms might lack views if not pool-facing
aiContent.skipIf: Skip if you prefer walking to Phitsanulok's temples and riverfront without relying on shuttles or taxis.
aiContent.detailedReview: Checking into Amora Tapae Phitsanulok (formerly Amarin Lagoon) feels welcoming in its resort-style lobby surrounded by greenery, with staff efficiently handling the process amid the quiet northern suburbs vibe. Rooms deliver on spaciousness, featuring modern furnishings like firm beds, ample desk space, and balconies that open to the pool or gardens, providing a peaceful retreat from Phitsanulok's traffic. The standout amenity is the large landscaped pool, where guests lounge on sunbeds under palm trees, though it can attract families splashing around midday. The on-site restaurant serves straightforward Thai and international dishes with decent portions, but options feel limited for longer stays without venturing out. Service is friendly and attentive, with staff quick to arrange shuttle rides to town, catering mostly to families and self-drive leisure travelers who appreciate the space over urban energy. Typical guests include parents with kids enjoying the pool or couples seeking a calm base, though the 4.0/5 TripAdvisor score reflects solid value rather than luxury thrills. Overall, it suits those wanting resort elements without the city clamor, but expect to plan transport for off-site meals or sights like Wat Phra Si Rattana Mahathat.
aiContent.locationReality: Located 3km north of Phitsanulok's city center, Amora Tapae Phitsanulok (formerly Amarin Lagoon) sits in the northern suburbs, a short 10-minute drive or 100-150 THB Grab ride to the Nan River waterfront. Within a 5-minute walk, you'll find little beyond quiet residential streets and perhaps a local shop, making the hotel's shuttle essential for reaching main attractions. For Wat Phra Si Rattana Mahathat temple, plan 15 minutes by car, as public options are sparse in this area.
localSignals: One large swimming pool on property
One restaurant and fitness center on-site
aiContent.travellerNote: Guests often praise the spacious rooms and relaxing pool area but note the inconvenience of the suburban location requiring transport for city exploration.
bookingTips: Request pool-view rooms for better access to the landscaped grounds
Check Agoda for cheapest rates in Thailand bookings
Prices spike in November-February high season for northern travel
Verify shuttle schedule and availability before booking
Confirm breakfast inclusion as it's not always standard

faq.q: Does Amora Tapae Phitsanulok have a pool?
faq.a: Yes, it features a large landscaped swimming pool in resort-style grounds, ideal for families and leisure.

faq.q: How far is Amora Tapae from Phitsanulok city center?
faq.a: It's 3km north, about a 10-minute drive; shuttle services to town are available.

faq.q: Is parking available at Amora Tapae Phitsanulok?
faq.a: As a resort suited for those with own transport, on-site parking is provided for guests.

faq.q: What facilities does Amora Tapae offer?
faq.a: Expect spacious rooms, a restaurant, fitness center, and pool; it's more resort-like than urban.

faq.q: Is Amora Tapae good for families?
faq.a: Yes, with its large pool and spacious rooms, it's best for families seeking space away from city noise.

faq.q: What's the review score for Amora Tapae?
faq.a: It holds a 4.0/5 on TripAdvisor, praised for value and facilities.

aiContent.urgencyLine: Rooms at Amora Tapae Phitsanulok (formerly Amarin Lagoon) with pool access book out 1-2 months ahead for high season — check today.
aiContent.methodology: We rated Amora Tapae Phitsanulok (formerly Amarin Lagoon) based on location, facilities, value, and guest feedback from sources like TripAdvisor. We weighted the pool and space highest because they define its resort appeal in a suburban setting. Prices and availability change — always verify before booking. Last updated: 2026-04.
aiContent.metaDescription: Amora Tapae Phitsanulok (formerly Amarin Lagoon) in Phitsanulok offers a large pool and spacious rooms in northern suburbs for families with transport. Note the 3km distance to city center requires shuttles. Book for resort value today. (148 characters)
